title: picea glauca subsp. albertiana
intro: Picea glauca subsp. albertiana, also known as the Alberta spruce, is a subspecies of white spruce native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues and infections. The health benefits of Picea glauca subsp. albertiana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
